name: stage2-rvv-segment2-memory-selected-body-owner-cleanup
title: Stage2 RVV segment2 memory selected-body owner-side cleanup
creator: codex
notes: Segment2 selected-body predicate and plain deinterleave/interleave realization moved out of central RVVSelectedBodyRealization.cpp into a dedicated RVVSegment2MemorySelectedBodyRealizationOwner module. Computed-mask segment2 load/store/update route through the new owner while preserving existing segment2 validation/realization helpers and generated-bundle behavior. Focused RVV plugin C++ tests, segment2 generated-bundle lit tests, authority scans, git diff --check, and check-tianchenrv passed.
